verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents unanimously identified Sri Lanka based on the unique Sinhala script and corroborating environmental cues. The judge correctly followed Path A (consensus) and made the right decision.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: Perfect consensus was reached immediately by all agents on the region (South Asia/Sri Lanka) due to the unique linguistic evidence, making the region narrowing process flawless.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool consisted of the single correct country, Sri Lanka. Given the unique linguistic evidence (Sinhala script), this was the only plausible candidate, making the pool perfectly accurate.
